flows.name: DEFECT-CategoryDelete-Not-Proactively-Disabled
flows.notes: Delete button disabled=false; guard message shown before confirm=false; spec (Screen 22) says Delete should be disabled with inline assigned-count message, not require opening+confirming a dialog first. dialogText="Delete category?  This cannot be undone.  Delete Espresso?  Cancel Delete Close"

flows.name: OrderRow-WholeRowClickability
flows.notes: TableRow has cursor-pointer styling implying the whole row is clickable, but only the order-number cell's <a> link actually navigates — clicking elsewhere in the row is a no-op.
